Class SubscriberWaitingListController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.BaseDisplayController
Controllers.SubscriberWaitingListController
All Implemented Interfaces:
AvailableTimesListener
public class SubscriberWaitingListController extends BaseDisplayController implements AvailableTimesListener
Controller for managing a subscriber's waiting list. Allows a subscriber to add themselves to a waiting list for a specific date and time, remove themselves by confirmation code, and view available times. Implements AvailableTimesListener to receive updates of available time slots from the server.

    Text field for entering the number of diners.
    private javafx.scene.control.ComboBox<String>

    Combo box for selecting an available time slot.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the subscriber waiting list controller. Sets up date picker limits, registers available times listener, and saves this controller as active in ClientHandler.

    • loadTimesForDate

      private void loadTimesForDate(LocalDate date)
      Requests available times from the server for the given date.
      Parameters:
      date - the date for which to retrieve available times

    • loadTimes

      public void loadTimes(List<LocalTime> times)
      Loads available times into the combo box.
      Parameters:
      times - list of LocalTime objects representing available slots

    • showReservations

      public void showReservations(List<Reservation> reservations)
      Not used in this screen.
      Specified by:
      showReservations in class BaseDisplayController
      Parameters:
      reservations - list of Reservation objects

    • ontakeplace

      private void ontakeplace()
      Sends a request to add the subscriber to the waiting list with the selected date, time, and number of diners.

    • clearAddFields

      public void clearAddFields()
      Clears the number of diners input field after adding to the waiting list.

    • onRemoveFromWaitingList

      private void onRemoveFromWaitingList()
      Sends a request to remove the subscriber from the waiting list using the confirmation code.

      public void clearConfirmationCodeField()
      Clears the confirmation code input field.

      private void onPreviousPage()
      Navigates back to the previous subscriber UI screen.

    • updateAvailableTimes

      public void updateAvailableTimes(List<LocalTime> times)
      Receives updated available times from the server and loads them into the combo box.
      Specified by:
      updateAvailableTimes in interface AvailableTimesListener
      Parameters:
      times - list of available LocalTime slots
